outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Analysis: Trump might not have a good way out of the Iran war
outlets.summary: CNN analysis argues Trump's 'close to finalizing' claims conflict with Shamkhani's 'fantasy' rejection, leaving no clear diplomatic off-ramp and raising fears of resumed conflict.

outlets.name: Democracy Now!
outlets.headline: U.S. Bombs Iran Despite Peace Talks; Israel Strikes Lebanon to 'Force Trump's Hand'
outlets.summary: Democracy Now! reports Israeli escalation in Lebanon (31 killed May 26) as Netanyahu's strategy to ensure any Iran deal doesn't constrain Israel's Lebanon operations.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Israel orders first-ever evacuation of Nabatieh; strikes city's hospital
outlets.summary: NPR reports Israeli forces struck a public hospital and destroyed the Civil Defense Center in Nabatieh after issuing the first-ever evacuation order for the city north of the Litani River.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump says deal 'close to finalizing with strong inspections' — Iran advisor calls it 'fantasy'
outlets.summary: Fox News covers Trump's optimistic 'close to finalizing' claim and the immediate Iranian hardliner pushback, framing it as Trump's dealmaking skill against Iranian obstruction.

outlets.name: The Hill
outlets.headline: Vance says he's 'extremely hopeful' Iran will agree to no-nukes deal
outlets.summary: The Hill reports VP Vance's optimistic assessment of Iran deal prospects, noting he is more confident than Rubio's cautious 'a few more days' framing from Jaipur.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: IRGC warns Iran's south is 'graveyard for aggressors' despite calling new US attack 'unlikely'
outlets.summary: Fox News covers the IRGC's dual-track deterrence signal: assessing US attack as unlikely while issuing 'graveyard' warning — framed as Iran's weakness masquerading as strength.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live May 27: New US attack 'unlikely' but 'graveyard' awaits, warns IRGC
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera's May 27 liveblog covers: Israel's Nabatieh evacuation and hospital strike, IRGC 'graveyard' warning, Trump 'close to finalizing,' Shamkhani rejects 'fantasy' inspections demand.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Israel expands ground operations in southern Lebanon as Hezbollah intensifies response
outlets.summary: Euronews reports Israeli forces struck Nabatieh hospital and Civil Defense Center, issued first-ever Nabatieh evacuation order, while Hezbollah claimed 32 operations at Zawtar al-Sharqiya.

outlets.name: PBS NewsHour
outlets.headline: Israel and Hezbollah clash along strategic river after overnight strikes; 2 killed in Deir Amas
outlets.summary: PBS NewsHour covers Israel-Hezbollah clashes along the Litani River, the dawn strike killing 2 in Deir Amas, and the broader context of 3,246+ killed in Lebanon since war began.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF strikes Nabatieh hospital, civil defense center; first-ever evacuation of the city ordered
outlets.summary: Times of Israel reports Israeli forces issued the first-ever evacuation order for Nabatieh, then struck the public hospital and Civil Defense Center as ground ops expand north of the Litani.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Hezbollah claims 32 operations vs. IDF at Zawtar — deploys night-vision FPV drones
outlets.summary: Jerusalem Post reports Hezbollah's most intensive single-day combat at Zawtar al-Sharqiya, including deployment of night-vision FPV drones against IDF ground forces advancing beyond the yellow line.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Netanyahu government faces opposition pressure as Lebanon operations expand beyond security zone
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports Israeli opposition warnings that expanding beyond the Litani River risks entangling Israel in Lebanon while Iran deal negotiations are at a critical juncture.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Shamkhani calls Trump's 'strong inspections' demand for Iran a 'fantasy'
outlets.summary: Iran International reports Shamkhani's rejection of Trump's nuclear inspection demands, framing it as the core obstacle to finalizing the Doha MOU, with the hardliner-pragmatist divide widening.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran: IRGC warns aggressors would face 'graveyard' — new US attack assessed as 'unlikely'
outlets.summary: PressTV amplifies IRGC's deterrence messaging: Iran is battle-ready, the south would be a 'graveyard for aggressors,' but strategically assesses a new US attack as unlikely given 'enemy weakness.'

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran internet partially restored despite judiciary halt — Pezeshkian-court standoff ongoing
outlets.summary: IRNA covers the unprecedented standoff between President Pezeshkian's executive order to restore internet access and the judiciary's counter-order — internet flickered back partially despite the court challenge.
